title: Modern Kitchen Overhaul
short_description: A complete kitchen transformation featuring custom white shaker cabinets, quartz countertops, and a spacious island with seating.
description: This dated 1990s kitchen was completely gutted and rebuilt with a modern open layout. The homeowners wanted a bright, functional space for cooking and entertaining. We installed custom white shaker cabinets, quartz countertops, a large island with bar seating, and new hardwood flooring throughout.
